title: Vertical Drop Horizontal Tug

jokes.text: Sienna Miller recognizing Larry from the news and praising him
jokes.setup: Famous actress encounters Larry at airport
jokes.punchline: She's seen him on the news for getting arrested and thanks him 'on behalf of everybody who has a heart'
jokes.explanation: Strong character moment - Larry's arrest has made him a folk hero, creating ironic celebrity status

jokes.text: Sienna says 'Keep in touch' and Larry interprets it as flirting
jokes.setup: Actress says casual goodbye
jokes.punchline: Larry completely misreads polite celebrity interaction as romantic interest
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry delusion - turning mundane politeness into romantic opportunity in his head

jokes.text: No, no, no, no, no! Stop, stop! Thanks, man.
jokes.setup: Larry trying to give away bagel
jokes.punchline: Homeless man taking it before Larry can change his mind
jokes.explanation: Perfect physical comedy of Larry's regret backfiring

jokes.text: 'It's so disrespectful. It's like sneezing in someone's face.'
jokes.setup: Jeff describing impact of Wordle spoiler
jokes.punchline: Comparing word game spoiler to physical assault
jokes.explanation: Sharp analogy - the violation of having something spoiled compared to physical rudeness

jokes.text: 'I know vulva. That's a great car.' / 'No, it's not a car.' / 'It's one of the safest cars.'
jokes.setup: Discussion of Larry's Wordle abilities
jokes.punchline: Larry confuses 'vulva' with 'Volvo' and doubles down on the car claim
jokes.explanation: Classic malapropism escalated perfectly - Larry's confidence about the 'safety' of vulvas as cars

jokes.text: Larry's balls are hanging out of his shorts, visible to others
jokes.setup: Larry wearing inappropriate shorts
jokes.punchline: His testicles are accidentally exposed and Leon calls him out
jokes.explanation: Visual setup for later payoff - establishes the problematic shorts that will save Larry money

jokes.text: I just saw your balls! They're hanging out with those shorts!
jokes.setup: Larry's inappropriate observation
jokes.punchline: His loud announcement of Leon's exposed anatomy
jokes.explanation: Sets up recurring ball visibility gag

jokes.text: 'Balls are disgusting. It's like the elephant man under your penis.'
jokes.setup: Discussion of why balls are problematic
jokes.punchline: Vivid comparison to famous deformed person
jokes.explanation: Brilliant grotesque imagery - unexpectedly poetic description of male anatomy

jokes.text: Leon's theory about balls and brain having same pattern under magnifying glass
jokes.setup: Continuing discussion of testicle appearance
jokes.punchline: 'That's why people say you're thinking with your dick'
jokes.explanation: Leon's pseudo-scientific explanation for common phrase is absurdly logical

jokes.text: Honestly, that one was on purpose!
jokes.setup: Larry getting another glimpse of Leon's anatomy
jokes.punchline: Admitting to intentional voyeurism
jokes.explanation: Good callback with Larry's inappropriate honesty

jokes.text: 'That's a little better.' regarding father-in-law vs father dying
jokes.setup: Duane corrects that it was father-in-law who died
jokes.punchline: Larry immediately downgrades his sympathy level
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry callousness - quantifying grief based on relationship proximity with brutal honesty

jokes.text: Larry's dog analogy: your dog vs your friend's dog dying
jokes.setup: Larry trying to explain difference in grief levels
jokes.punchline: Comparing human death to pet death to make his point about father vs father-in-law
jokes.explanation: Larry's attempt at logical grief hierarchy through increasingly inappropriate analogies

jokes.text: 'Between you and me, my condolences aren't quite as deep as the average person's.'
jokes.setup: Duane questioning Larry's sincerity
jokes.punchline: Larry admits his sympathy is calibrated lower than normal
jokes.explanation: Brilliant honesty about emotional shallowness - Larry admits what everyone suspects about themselves

jokes.text: Larry's theory that nobody means 'I love you' or 'sorry'
jokes.setup: Explaining his shallow condolences
jokes.punchline: 'They're interchangeable, really. Nobody means it'
jokes.explanation: Cynical but recognizable observation about hollow social conventions

jokes.text: 'It's our tree when you want lemons, and it's my tree when we have to take care of it'
jokes.setup: Duane wants to split tree maintenance costs
jokes.punchline: Larry points out the convenient ownership switching
jokes.explanation: Sharp logic trap - Larry identifies the hypocrisy in neighbor's convenient property claims

jokes.text: 'I can go the rest of my life without touching a lemon.'
jokes.setup: Duane assumes Larry wants the lemons
jokes.punchline: Larry dramatically renounces lemons entirely
jokes.explanation: Larry's stubborn absolutism - willing to forgo citrus forever to make a point

jokes.text: 'You're gonna put grapefruit on fish?' / 'I haven't actually put it on, but I've thought about it.'
jokes.setup: Larry claims grapefruit can substitute for lemons
jokes.punchline: Admits he's never actually tried his own suggestion
jokes.explanation: Larry's theoretical food knowledge - confidently suggesting untested culinary combinations

jokes.text: 'My point is lemons are a fungible citrus.'
jokes.setup: Larry making case for citrus interchangeability
jokes.punchline: Uses financial term 'fungible' for fruit
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry pretension - applying economic terminology to produce arguments

jokes.text: 'Well, you'd think his ancestors would be ashamed of him.'
jokes.setup: Larry complaining about Duane being descendant of Harriet Tubman
jokes.punchline: Suggesting Harriet Tubman would disapprove of tree cost-sharing
jokes.explanation: Audacious historical judgment - invoking civil rights hero in petty neighbor dispute

jokes.text: 'You know the cruel irony of this, right? You're being railroaded.'
jokes.setup: Discussion of Tubman descendant treating Larry unfairly
jokes.punchline: Uses railroad terminology given Harriet Tubman's Underground Railroad connection
jokes.explanation: Brilliant historical wordplay - 'railroaded' perfectly connects to Underground Railroad legacy

jokes.text: Freddy's matter-of-fact announcement about having sex with neighbor's wife
jokes.setup: Casual conversation about Freddy looking good
jokes.punchline: 'I've been having a lot of sex with my neighbor's wife' said casually
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan delivery of shocking information - the casual tone makes it funnier

jokes.text: Blanks. Shooting blanks.
jokes.setup: Explaining husband's infertility
jokes.punchline: Crude but efficient description
jokes.explanation: Direct crude humor

jokes.text: 'When the shit gets lit up, there's no goddamn rules.'
jokes.setup: Explaining how the clinical arrangement was supposed to work
jokes.punchline: Admits the boundaries immediately collapsed
jokes.explanation: Vivid description of how plans go awry when physical attraction takes over

jokes.text: 'We do it at my house on the Funk-O-Matic. We're biting butts. We're biting the ears.'
jokes.setup: Describing the passionate encounters
jokes.punchline: Increasingly wild details including mysterious 'Funk-O-Matic'
jokes.explanation: Escalating sexual absurdity - the 'Funk-O-Matic' is particularly mysterious and funny

jokes.text: 'Do you smell musk? The sex musk you release is great for conception.'
jokes.setup: Discussion of Freddy's sexual encounters
jokes.punchline: Susie asks about sex musk in front of everyone
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable TMI moment - Susie's inappropriate biological observation at dinner party

jokes.text: 'I got to say, for a male dog, it looks a tad effeminate.'
jokes.setup: Larry examining the new puppy Frankie
jokes.punchline: Questions the dog's masculinity
jokes.explanation: Larry applying human gender expectations to a puppy - typical inappropriate observation

jokes.text: 'I think you better get that dog a pronoun.'
jokes.setup: Continuing concern about dog's appearance
jokes.punchline: Suggests dog needs gender identity clarification
jokes.explanation: Awkward contemporary gender politics applied to pet - Larry missing the point as usual

jokes.text: I think you better get that dog a pronoun.
jokes.setup: Larry's continued gender commentary
jokes.punchline: Modern pronoun reference for dog
jokes.explanation: Current social issue reference applied to pet

jokes.text: 'It's not a lingering bench, okay? It's an aesthetic bench.'
jokes.setup: Larry wants to sit on bench during golf lesson
jokes.punchline: Golf pro creates arbitrary bench categories
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist distinction - the concept of bench having aesthetic vs functional purpose

jokes.text: 'Now, I've dropped before, but I've never tugged! And now I'm tugging!'
jokes.setup: Larry excited about golf improvement from overheard lesson
jokes.punchline: Enthusiastic about learning to 'tug' in golf swing
jokes.explanation: Larry's innocent excitement has unintended sexual undertones with 'tugging'

jokes.text: 'I think this is the happiest I've ever been in my life!'
jokes.setup: Larry thrilled about golf improvement
jokes.punchline: Claims peak happiness from minor golf tip
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry proportionality - treating minor golf improvement as life-changing event

jokes.text: No one on the planet would believe that you're happy.
jokes.setup: Jeff's response to Larry's happiness
jokes.punchline: Universal recognition of Larry's misery
jokes.explanation: Jeff's perfect observation about Larry's reputation

jokes.text: I'm sick of your historical references. If nominated, I will not run. If bequeathed, I will not accept.
jokes.setup: Jeff's complaint about Larry's references
jokes.punchline: Making his own historical reference in complaint
jokes.explanation: Clever Sherman reference while complaining about historical references

jokes.text: Larry hits Troy with golf ball using the new technique
jokes.setup: Larry tries new golf swing technique
jokes.punchline: Accidentally achieves career-best distance and hits deaf golfer
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback payoff - the overheard golf tip leads to Larry's best and worst shot ever

jokes.text: 'I couldn't yell "fore". I mean, he can't hear.'
jokes.setup: Larry explaining why he didn't warn the golfer
jokes.punchline: Logic that deaf person can't hear fore warning
jokes.explanation: Larry's flawed logic about golf etiquette and deaf accessibility - technically correct but missing the point

jokes.text: 'I'm gonna just drop it over here. I'll drop it where the body was.'
jokes.setup: Larry wants to continue playing from where ball hit Troy
jokes.punchline: Refers to injured person's position as 'where the body was'
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly dark phrasing - treating living injured person like crime scene body outline

jokes.text: That could be my puppy! - Does your neighbor have a dog? - Yeah, there's a few dogs around. So maybe one of your neighbors' dogs.
jokes.setup: Jeff's concern about coyote attack
jokes.punchline: Larry's callous probability calculation
jokes.explanation: Larry's cold mathematical approach to pet tragedy

jokes.text: 'If he's dead, what are you gonna do, sit Shiva?'
jokes.setup: Larry convincing Jeff not to leave golf course
jokes.punchline: Suggests Jewish mourning ritual for a dog
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry callousness - applying religious mourning practices to pet death

jokes.text: Either my puppy's dead or it's a neighbor's dog. Nothing you could do either way.
jokes.setup: Jeff accepting Larry's logic
jokes.punchline: Casual acceptance of potential tragedy
jokes.explanation: Jeff adopting Larry's cold logic

jokes.text: 'Either my puppy's dead or it's a neighbor's dog. Nothing you could do either way.'
jokes.setup: Larry's logical argument for continuing golf
jokes.punchline: Cold calculation that puppy death is binary and unchangeable
jokes.explanation: Larry's ruthless utilitarian logic applied to emotional pet situation

jokes.text: 'This little boy, this little beautiful, little creature is dead, and you continue to play?'
jokes.setup: Susie discovering they continued golf despite coyote sounds
jokes.punchline: Her melodramatic outrage at their callousness
jokes.explanation: Susie's emotional breakdown provides moral counterpoint to Larry's cold logic

jokes.text: 'Certainly, I would give you more consideration than I gave the dog.'
jokes.setup: Susie asks what Larry would do if she were attacked by coyote
jokes.punchline: Admits he'd rank human above dog but still play through
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry hierarchy of care - admits human would get 'more consideration' but not enough to stop golfing

jokes.text: Certainly, I would give you more consideration than I gave the dog. But ultimately, I think I'd play through.
jokes.setup: Susie asking about Larry being attacked
jokes.punchline: Admitting he'd still prioritize golf
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry escalation - admitting even human tragedy wouldn't stop golf

jokes.text: 'Well depends how I'm playing.'
jokes.setup: Larry admits he wouldn't leave course even for Jeff's death
jokes.punchline: Golf performance would determine his compassion level
jokes.explanation: Peak Larry selfishness - even best friend's death is secondary to golf score. Brutal honesty perfectly delivered

jokes.text: 'This is very un-Tubman-like behavior.'
jokes.setup: Larry confronting Duane about tree costs again
jokes.punchline: Invoking historical ancestor to shame modern behavior
jokes.explanation: Larry's continued inappropriate invocation of civil rights history for property disputes

jokes.text: 'Harriet, they're dropping into the yard. I don't need it.'
jokes.setup: Larry imagining conversation with Harriet Tubman
jokes.punchline: Casual dialogue with historical figure about fruit
jokes.explanation: Larry's imagined intimate relationship with historical figure - the casual 'Harriet' is particularly funny

jokes.text: Every Black person you meet, you say 'brother' to? - You say 'brother' and you give him one of those right there. - You too? - Respectful nod.
jokes.setup: Larry calling out racial greeting patterns
jokes.punchline: Leon's casual explanation of social codes
jokes.explanation: Good social observation about racial greeting codes

jokes.text: 'You say "brother" and you give him one of those right there.'
jokes.setup: Larry noting Leon's greeting to Duane
jokes.punchline: Pointing out performative Black solidarity gestures
jokes.explanation: Larry's awkward racial observations - uncomfortable but true social pattern recognition

jokes.text: A nod is like our 'aloha'. - I don't do a Jew nod. You guys got that song already, 'Hey, Jew'. That's Hey Jude with a D. J-U-D-E.
jokes.setup: Discussion of cultural greetings
jokes.punchline: Beatles song pun with Jewish twist
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay connecting cultural greetings to Beatles song

jokes.text: 'Those withered grotesqueries just saved me 1,350 dollars!'
jokes.setup: Duane flees after seeing Larry's exposed testicles
jokes.punchline: Larry celebrates his balls' financial benefit with flowery language
jokes.explanation: Brilliant callback payoff - the grotesque 'withered grotesqueries' description is perfectly Larry

jokes.text: 'What do you got, three sperm?'
jokes.setup: Jeff volunteers for conception duty
jokes.punchline: Larry questions Jeff's fertility based on age
jokes.explanation: Precise insult about aging male fertility - the specific number '3' makes it funnier

jokes.text: 'The only problem is you can't get someone pregnant on old-ass sperm when it's in powdered milk form.'
jokes.setup: Sperm quality debate between Larry and Jeff
jokes.punchline: Leon's vivid description of aged sperm consistency
jokes.explanation: Vivid and disgusting imagery for elderly fertility - 'powdered milk form' is particularly gross

jokes.text: Leon's video message: 'I'm looking forward to tapping that ass. Hope you ready.'
jokes.setup: Leon making video for potential conception partner
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate sexual enthusiasm for clinical arrangement
jokes.explanation: Leon's inappropriate approach to what should be clinical arrangement - pure character consistency

jokes.text: 'Wave means what? Hello. Goodbye. But it doesn't mean "I'm going to hit you with a golf ball".'
jokes.setup: Larry's defense about waving instead of yelling fore
jokes.punchline: Takahashi's logical breakdown of wave meanings
jokes.explanation: Good logical deconstruction of Larry's wave excuse

jokes.text: 'It's kusai.' / 'Stinky.'
jokes.setup: Mr. Takahashi judging Larry's golf behavior
jokes.punchline: Calls Larry's behavior 'stinky' in Japanese then English
jokes.explanation: Bilingual insult with childish simplicity - calling behavior 'stinky' is both dismissive and funny

jokes.text: 'Sitting prohibited during lessons' sign on roped-off bench
jokes.setup: Larry's bench-sitting caused problems
jokes.punchline: Golf course creates specific rule to stop Larry
jokes.explanation: Perfect visual callback - Larry's behavior literally changes golf course policy

jokes.text: You're putting me in your will 'cause you want me to put you in my will.
jokes.setup: Jeff realizing Larry's motivation
jokes.punchline: Exposing quid pro quo inheritance scheme
jokes.explanation: Sharp insight into Larry's manipulative generosity

jokes.text: 'You're putting me in your will 'cause you want me to put you in my will.'
jokes.setup: Larry's insistence on will inclusion
jokes.punchline: Jeff realizes Larry's ulterior motive
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry scheme exposure - Jeff correctly identifies the manipulative reciprocity

jokes.text: 'You cocksucker. You gave away Wordle? You fuck. That's so low.'
jokes.setup: Jeff spoils Larry's Wordle as revenge
jokes.punchline: Larry's disproportionate outrage at game spoiler
jokes.explanation: Larry getting taste of his own medicine - the intense profanity for word game is perfect

jokes.text: 'I got a friend in Israel!' / 'My friend lives on the equator!'
jokes.setup: Competing over who can spoil Wordle earlier via time zones
jokes.punchline: Increasingly ridiculous geographic claims for Wordle advantage
jokes.explanation: Absurdist escalation - the equator isn't even a time zone, showing how ridiculous the competition has become

jokes.text: Don't look at the ball!' Give me a break! Moron!
jokes.setup: Larry's outrage at golf advice
jokes.punchline: Dismissing fundamental golf instruction
jokes.explanation: Larry's resistance to counterintuitive advice

jokes.text: 'Isn't that something you should be doing in private? I got pants on. What are you talking about?'
jokes.setup: Larry using Theragun on his groin injury
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate public use and Larry's defense
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment with Larry's oblivious public behavior

jokes.text: Hey, shut the fuck up. - Don't you talk to my dog that way!
jokes.setup: Larry addressing barking dog
jokes.punchline: Susie's protective response
jokes.explanation: Standard pet owner defensive reaction

jokes.text: I think you're jealous that I'm the one who got arrested in Atlanta and I'm getting all this attention.
jokes.setup: Larry's counter-accusation
jokes.punchline: Competing for victim status
jokes.explanation: Larry's competitive martyrdom complex

jokes.text: 'I think you're jealous that I'm the one who got arrested in Atlanta'
jokes.setup: Ted criticizing Larry's Atlanta attention
jokes.punchline: Larry treats arrest as achievement worthy of envy
jokes.explanation: Larry's twisted perspective - viewing arrest as social capital worth competing over

jokes.text: I'm authentic. I care about myself. - And only yourself. There's an authenticity involved in caring about oneself.
jokes.setup: Larry defending his selfishness
jokes.punchline: Philosophical justification for narcissism
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry philosophical self-justification

jokes.text: This motherfucker can bend his body up and lick his own balls. Do you think that motherfucker can't lick his own nuts? Of course he can.
jokes.setup: Leon's contortionist analogy
jokes.punchline: Graphic comparison of human flexibility
jokes.explanation: Classic Leon crude anatomical logic

jokes.text: 'That little motherfucker gon' come out with a mustache and bad credit.'
jokes.setup: Leon describing his strong sperm
jokes.punchline: Baby would inherit Leon's specific characteristics
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Leon line - combining masculine trait (mustache) with modern problem (bad credit) perfectly captures his character

jokes.text: 'Fuck is she, the cum police?'
jokes.setup: Woman tells Leon no masturbating before conception attempt
jokes.punchline: Leon's outrage at fertility restrictions
jokes.explanation: Perfect Leon reaction - 'cum police' is crude but captures his indignation perfectly

jokes.text: Larry's elaborate fish dream explanation to Mr. Takahashi
jokes.setup: Larry explaining his behavior to golf club owner
jokes.punchline: Completely irrelevant dream sequence about fish pecking
jokes.explanation: Classic Larry rambling defense - completely missing the point with irrelevant personal details

jokes.text: What was that? Was that a coyote? - Mabel? Did you hear a dog? I didn't hear shit.
jokes.setup: Coyote sound during Leon's encounter
jokes.punchline: Leon's casual dismissal during intimate moment
jokes.explanation: Good dark callback with Leon's oblivious priorities

tmdb_overview: Larry's improved golf game causes trouble with an acclaimed actor. Freddy helps his neighbors through a delicate issue.
